title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF PINANA-AN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MARABUT, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, INTO A REGULAR BARRIO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5375 / 53 OG No. 16, 5146 (August 31, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1715, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF PINANA-AN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MARABUT, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, INTO A REGULAR BARRIO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Pinana-an in the Municipality of Marabut, Province of Samar, is hereby converted into a barrio to be known henceforth as the barrio of Pinalangga.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
